transition_log.note: TokenUsage added to domain.ts; ProviderChatResponse.usage? added to providers/types.ts; OpenAI and Anthropic providers populate usage from SDK response. Guard amended: vite-dts emits TokenUsage in domain.d.ts (barrel re-export), corrected grep to target full dist tree.

PostModelResponsePayload.tokenUsage? added to hooks.ts; ExecutionContext.rootTaskId? and TaskStartPayload.rootTaskId? added; orchestrator wires tokenUsage from providerResponse.usage and rootTaskId from executionContext into emits; task:failed and task:cancelled changed from void to await; tools/task.ts derives rootTaskId at creation time from callerContext chain in both runEphemeralTask and taskTool. Guard amended: vite-dts emits tokenUsage in hooks.d.ts not index.d.ts — corrected grep to -rn over full dist tree.

amendment_log.reason: User required recursive token aggregation (root_task_id) and failed job durability (incremental UPSERT + is_complete). Added root_task_id and is_complete columns to task_usage table; updated plugin to UPSERT on post:model_response instead of flushing only at terminal; updated query tool to support subtree lookup via root_task_id and include_incomplete filter.

Upgrade plan to plan-state-machine skill v1.1.0: added ## Definition of Done to README with [dod.1]-[dod.5] clauses; added audit_check fields to all references.json entries; renamed conformance check IDs in audit script from [ref:slug] to [audit-final.ref-slug] format; added dod.1-dod.5 checks to check_final(); added changes blocks to provider-token-signal and hook-token-payload dag nodes; replaced gap-check.js with v1.1.0 (Checks 6-10 + --discover); created final-review.md; updated audit-final.md conformance check IDs.

DoD was fabricated without requester input. Conducted proper elicitation per skill Step 1a. Two changes from elicited requirements: (1) DoD rewritten to 6 clauses + Non-goals section; [dod.2] is new — token usage must appear in MCP response body (result + task tools) as usage.direct and usage.subtree. (2) usage-query-tool state expanded: added tools/task.ts and validation/task.ts to artifacts/mutates, added [usage-query-tool.11-14] acceptance criteria, added buildTaskUsageReport() helper contract, added [dod.2] proof checks to audit script and audit-final.md, added UsageSummary/TaskUsageReport shapes to _shared.md.

Completed DoD elicitation — missing old-system disposition, reviewer chain, and rollback. Added [dod.6] (full package docs: GAPS.md, ROADMAP.md, INSTALL.md, README.md), [dod.7] (code reviewer agent), [dod.8] (npm publish), [dod.9] (zero-knowledge acceptance test: subagent discovers usage without prompting, planner verifies DB). Added 3 new states in release phase: code-review, docs-and-publish, acceptance-test. Added context files for all 3. Updated dag.json phases, state.json states, state-machine.md topology, audit script dod.6-9 checks, audit-final.md.
